source_modules_imported: ActionIntent capability model, reimplemented in Python
high-risk feature flag defaults, mapped to v2/config/feature_flags.example.json
sandbox-only execution concept, reimplemented in Python
approval queue concept, reimplemented in Python
audit log concept, reimplemented in Python
project report/archive concept, integrated with existing Yuzhineng project archive
license_status: Clean-room internal module. Upstream research module was not copied wholesale. No IMAI.WORK official source, API, database schema, crawler implementation, test account data or demo user data imported.
clean_room_statement: This merge migrates reusable capability ideas from the clean-room Growth OS research module into Yuzhineng using new Python implementation and adapters. It excludes third-party source copies, official IMAI.WORK implementation details, secrets, cookies, browser profiles, databases and real user data.
reason_for_exclusion: .research_tmp contained browser profiles, temporary crawl outputs, logs and local research artifacts; it was quarantined under D:\OpenClaw\backups\growth-os-source-quarantine and not imported.
node_modules, dist, build and caches are dependencies/build outputs and must not be committed.
UI CDP scripts and old verification output are not needed for the mainline Python capability merge.
test project archives are verification artifacts, not product modules.
